messages: Ice cold. Maybe try a group chat first.
The stars are not aligned.
Friendship mode — romance not detected.
This ship might need a life raft.
Different universes, same Discord.
The compatibility meter filed for overtime.
Cute as friends. As a ship? Debatable.
If this were a movie, you'd still be in act one — of someone else's story.
Low signal. Try turning friendship off and on again.
Slow burn — very slow.
There's something there, maybe.
Chemistry pending further patches.
Not impossible, just unlikely today.
A flicker, not a flame.
Roommates in the same server, soulmates in another timeline.
Could grow on you — emphasis on could.
The vibe is 'we'll see' with extra ellipsis.
Better than a coin flip. Not by much.
Solid maybe energy.
Worth a fanfic chapter.
The group chat would ship it.
Enough spark to notice.
Comfortably ambiguous — in a fun way.
Plot armor not included, but the banter carries.
Halfway between meme and manifesto.
Not loud, but the ship name is already in beta.
The kind of tension that survives a typo in chat.
Canon energy.
The timeline converges.
Main-pair material.
Even the algorithm is rooting for this.
Screenshot this and frame it.
If chemistry were Wi‑Fi, you'd be full bars.
The server ships it. The stars agree. The bot is just formalizing it.
Endgame arc loading.
Someone write the AU — the numbers already did.
